Source.title: Blog Source
Source.description: An AI developer blog or news page to be monitored.

name.description: Human-friendly name of the blog source

pageUrl.description: URL of the main blog or news page

feedUrl.description: URL of the RSS feed or XML Sitemap (if applicable)

selector.description: CSS selector to extract links when scraping

enabled.description: Whether checking is active for this source

consecutiveEmptyCount.description: Number of consecutive checking attempts returning zero items

lastCheckedAt.description: Timestamp of the last analysis session

lastError.description: Error message of the last check if it failed

SeenArticle.title: Seen Article
SeenArticle.description: A cache of successfully detected articles to avoid duplicate notifications.

sourceId.description: ID of the parent Source resource

firstSeenAt.description: Timestamp when this article was first indexed

seen_articles.description: Database of articles that have already been discovered and parsed.
